evals.prompt: Tenho o épico de pagamento PIX no ClickUp (86abc123) e 2 semanas de teste. Critérios de aceite: geração QR, confirmação assíncrona, estorno parcial, timeout 30s. Monta a matriz PRISMA completa com as 6 fases — posso trazer PO e dev sênior para scoring.
evals.expected_output: Relatório markdown com risk items (≤35), fatores Impacto/Likelihood, scoring, matriz em 4 quadrantes (Must/Should/Could/Won't), issue list, abordagem diferenciada, resumo stakeholders e good enough testing; menção às 6 fases; salvar em output/prisma/.

assertions.name: contains_risk_items_table
assertions.description: Output includes a risk items table with RI- IDs

assertions.name: contains_four_quadrants
assertions.description: Output classifies items into Q I-IV or Must/Should/Could/Won't Test

assertions.name: contains_differentiated_approach
assertions.description: Output includes differentiated test approach per quadrant or item

assertions.name: distinguishes_product_risk
assertions.description: Output frames product risk (not systematic review PRISMA)

evals.prompt: MR alterou só o módulo de autenticação no zig-api — JWT refresh, logout em todos os dispositivos e rate limit no login. Preciso rápido: risk items e abordagem diferenciada PRISMA, sem reunião de consenso.
evals.expected_output: Modo rápido: risk items derivados do MR, assumptions explícitas (QA simula negócio+técnico), matriz, abordagem por quadrante, seção ressalvas em vez de issue list formal.

assertions.name: fast_mode_documented
assertions.description: Documents fast/solo QA mode with explicit assumptions

assertions.name: auth_risk_items
assertions.description: Risk items cover JWT refresh, logout, and/or rate limit

assertions.name: matrix_and_approach
assertions.description: Includes risk matrix and differentiated approach

evals.prompt: Release amanhã, squeeze total — mudou checkout, carrinho e cupom. O que testar HOJE com PRISMA? Só tenho 6 horas de QA.
evals.expected_output: Modo squeeze: risk items focados nos módulos tocados, priorização Q I (+ Q II críticos), ordem de execução do dia, riscos aceitos explicitamente para Q III/IV, resumo para stakeholders.

assertions.name: squeeze_mode
assertions.description: Acknowledges time constraint and prioritizes for today

assertions.name: q1_priority_list
assertions.description: Lists Must Test / Q I items first with execution order

assertions.name: accepted_risks
assertions.description: Documents deferred or won't-test areas with explicit acceptance
